visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a blue patterned flat cap is walking quickly down a city sidewalk. He wears a grey t-shirt with a tricolor stripe detail on the collar. The background shows modern urban architecture, green shrubbery, and colorful advertising posters on glass windows. The camera follows him in a handheld tracking shot. (2) The man stops and turns toward the camera with a surprised expression. He stands in front of a glass-door entrance to a building. The lighting is bright natural daylight. He begins talking expressively, gesturing with his hands. (3) The scene shifts indoors to a brightly lit electronics retail store. The man stands in front of wooden shelving packed with colorful product boxes. He holds up various iPhone 16 series packaging boxes (iPhone 16 Pro, 16 Pro Max, 16, and 16e) one by one towards the camera lens, showing the front and sides of the boxes while pointing at them. (4) The camera cuts to close-up shots of the phone boxes, then back to the man's expressive face as he speaks directly to the viewer. He points a finger for emphasis. (5) He walks to a glass display counter containing used smartphones and points at a white iPhone 14. He smiles and nods, then gives a final thumbs-up or finger-point toward the camera in a medium close-up shot.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 老闆等一下等一下!. [Slogan]: 走超快. (2) [Variety]: 想怎樣?. [Subtitle]: 老闆 你知道現在在哪裡可以買到 很多的 iPhone 手機嗎. (3) [Variety]: 你要幹嘛?. [Subtitle]: 你不知道現在國際情勢嗎 我要趁這波 買起來 然後賺差價啊!. (4) [Variety]: 你傻了?. [Subtitle]: 我跟你講! 米可現在呢 都有現貨 而且它還凍漲! 不相信我帶你去走! (5) [Variety]: (真 · 行動派). [Subtitle]: 我現在人就在米可店裡 我跟米可確認過了. (6) [Subtitle]: 你看 iPhone16 Pro 256G/黑色 36690元. [Slogan]: iPhone16 Pro 256G/黑色 36690元. (7) [Subtitle]: 大家很喜歡的 iPhone16 ProMax 256G/原色鈦金屬 40190元. [Slogan]: iPhone16 ProMax 256G/原色鈦金屬 40190元. (8) [Subtitle]: 粉紅色 女生很喜歡 iPhone16 128G/粉紅色 25990元. [Slogan]: iPhone16 128G/粉紅色 25990元. (9) [Subtitle]: 最後一個 才剛出的 iPhone16e 黑色 19290元. [Slogan]: iPhone16e 黑色 19290元. (10) [Variety]: 現貨都有. [Subtitle]: 全部米可目前 現貨都有 而且還凍漲!. (11) [Variety]: 你是不是傻了 還想賺差價?! 幫你省錢啊!. (12) [Subtitle]: 再跟你講! 它還賣二手機 這支 iPhone14 128G 健康度86% 16900元. [Slogan]: (二手) iPhone14 128G/白色 健康度86% 16900元. (13) [Variety]: 乖乖上班啦!!! 再次打擊你.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male character presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian man wearing black-rimmed glasses, a blue patterned cap, and a grey t-shirt with a tricolor (red/white/blue) stripe on the neck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts on a clean urban sidewalk with modern glass-fronted buildings and greenery; moves into a well-lit, organized tech retail store with wooden shelves displaying various electronic accessories and phone boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched bubble pop SFX triggers a fast-paced male voice shouting 'Boss, wait!' over a bright, syncopated electronic BGM track. (2) A second, more grounded male voice responds skeptically, asking 'What do you want?'. (3) The first male voice launches into an excited, rapid-fire explanation about wanting to scalp iPhones, accompanied by cartoonish 'boing' sound effects. (4) The second voice interrupts with a sharp tone, calling him stupid, followed by a comedic 'ding' and a sparkling sound effect as he starts listing prices. (5) As each iPhone model is mentioned, a light rhythmic percussive sound matches the text appearing on screen. The vocal delivery is enunciated and confident. (6) A final comical chime sounds as the second speaker concludes with a playful, mocking tone, emphasizing the store's benefit.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Conflict -> Explanation -> Proof/List -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous dialogue between a 'wannabe scalper' and a tech expert to promote the mobile phone retailer 'Miko'. It aims to inform viewers that the store has stock of the iPhone 16 series at stable, non-inflated prices, as well as affordable used options like the iPhone 14.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Constant brand watermark 'miko', explicit mention of the store name in dialogue, and direct promotion of product inventory and pricing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social media advertisement leveraging the persona of 3CTim to provide consumer advice while endorsing a specific electronics chain.
